decision_reason: artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.requested_mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.native_row_aware_lm_head must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.c2_equality_green must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_rows must be an int; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_artifact must be under benchmarks/results; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
label: c2_serial_with_baselines_profiler_final_defaults
